description: Constantly exploring AI/ML and integrating it into web projects. Building full-stack projects like AlgoForge and ViTravelBuddy, while strengthening DSA fundamentals.

description: Transitioned from static websites to full-stack applications. Picked up modern tools and deployed projects securely to production.
